content.explanation:
**Prepositions Part 2 — Position & Direction Prepositions:**

**ABOVE / BELOW — ऊपर / नीचे (without touching):**
🇮🇳 तस्वीर मेज़ के ऊपर है।
🇬🇧 The picture is **above** the table. (touching नहीं)
ON = ऊपर (touching); ABOVE = ऊपर (not touching)

**BETWEEN / AMONG — के बीच:**
• Between = 2 चीज़ों/लोगों के बीच
🇬🇧 The bank is **between** the post office and the school.
• Among = 3 या अधिक चीज़ों/लोगों के बीच
🇬🇧 She is the best **among** all the students.

**THROUGH — के बीच से (अंदर से गुज़रना):**
🇮🇳 हम जंगल के बीच से निकले।
🇬🇧 We walked **through** the forest.

**ACROSS — के पार / आर-पार:**
🇮🇳 वह नदी के उस पार है।
🇬🇧 She swam **across** the river.

**Other Important Prepositions:**
• **Behind** = पीछे | **In front of** = सामने
• **Over** = ऊपर से (motion) | **Under** = नीचे
• **Along** = के साथ-साथ | **Around** = चारों तरफ
rules: Above/Below = without physical contact (above the cloud, below zero)
On/Under = with surface contact (on the table, under the table)
Between = exactly 2 people/things (between you and me)
Among = 3 or more in a group (among friends, among the crowd)
Through = movement inside and out (through the tunnel)
Across = movement from one side to the other (across the street)
Over = above with movement or covering (jumped over, spread over)
content.memoryTrick:
**B-A-T**:
• **B**etween = 2 things
• **A**mong = 3+ in a group
• **T**hrough = enter one side, exit other

ACROSS = A+CROSS (सड़क को cross करना) → surface को cross करना

examples.hindi: Fan छत के नीचे लगा है।
examples.english: The fan is below the ceiling.

examples.hindi: हम आपस में बात कर रहे थे।
दो दोस्तों के बीच में झगड़ा हुआ।
examples.english: There was a fight between two friends.

examples.hindi: ट्रेन tunnel के अंदर से गुज़री।
examples.english: The train went through the tunnel.

examples.hindi: वह सड़क पार कर रहा है।
examples.english: He is walking across the road.
examples.type: ACROSS — from one side to other

examples.hindi: Bridge नदी के ऊपर बना है।
examples.english: The bridge is over the river.

mistakes.wrong: She sits between all her friends.
mistakes.correct: She sits among all her friends.

mistakes.wrong: The bird flew across the trees.
mistakes.correct: The bird flew through the trees.
mistakes.why: 'Through' = अंदर से; 'across' = एक side से दूसरी side

mistakes.wrong: There is a bridge above the river.
mistakes.correct: There is a bridge over the river.

mistakes.why: 'Across' for swimming/crossing from one side to another

speakingTips: अपने office/school का description दो: 'My desk is between the window and the door.'
Directions देते समय: 'Go through the market, across the bridge, then turn right.'
रोज़ 3 sentences different prepositions से बनाओ

vocabulary.example: There is a hospital in the vicinity.
The library is adjacent to the college.
He sits on the peripheral seat.
The treasure is buried beneath the ground.

practice.hindi: वह कमरे में अंदर आया।
practice.english: He came into the room.
alternatives: he entered into the room.

practice.hindi: बच्चा पूल में कूदा।
practice.english: The child jumped into the pool.
alternatives: the kid jumped into the swimming pool.

practice.hindi: उसने किताब मेज़ पर रख दी।
practice.english: She put the book onto the table.
alternatives: she placed the book on the table.

practice.hindi: मैं अपने परिवार के साथ रहता हूँ।
practice.english: I live with my family.
alternatives: i stay with my family.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम मेरे साथ आओगे?
practice.english: Will you come with me?
alternatives: are you coming with me?

practice.hindi: वह चाकू से सेब काटती है।
practice.english: She cuts the apple with a knife.
alternatives: she slices apple with a knife.

practice.hindi: मुझे तुमसे बात करनी है।
practice.english: I need to talk with you.
alternatives: i need to speak with you.

practice.hindi: मैं लखनऊ से हूँ।
practice.english: I am from Lucknow.
alternatives: i belong to lucknow.

practice.hindi: दिल्ली से मुंबई 1400 किलोमीटर है।
practice.english: Delhi is 1400 kilometres from Mumbai.
alternatives: it is 1400 km from delhi to mumbai.

practice.hindi: उसे बचपन से किताबें पढ़ने का शौक है।
practice.english: She has been fond of reading books from childhood.
alternatives: she loves reading since childhood.

practice.hindi: मुझे इस विषय के बारे में ज़्यादा जानकारी नहीं है।
practice.english: I do not know much about this subject.
alternatives: i don't know much about this topic.

practice.hindi: वे बैठक के बारे में बात कर रहे थे।
practice.english: They were talking about the meeting.
alternatives: they were discussing about the meeting.

practice.hindi: मुझे उसके बारे में कुछ पता नहीं।
practice.english: I do not know anything about him.
alternatives: i don't know anything about him.

practice.hindi: बैंक और स्कूल के बीच एक पार्क है।
practice.english: There is a park between the bank and the school.
alternatives: a park is located between bank and school.

practice.hindi: मेरा घर दो बड़ी इमारतों के बीच है।
practice.english: My house is between two big buildings.
alternatives: my home is between two large buildings.

practice.hindi: दोनों भाइयों के बीच कोई लड़ाई नहीं है।
practice.english: There is no fight between the two brothers.
alternatives: the two brothers do not fight.

practice.hindi: वह अपने दोस्तों के बीच बहुत लोकप्रिय है।
practice.english: She is very popular among her friends.
alternatives: she is popular in her friend group.

practice.hindi: उसने अपनी बात सबके बीच रखी।
practice.english: He put his point among everyone.
alternatives: he presented his point to everyone.

practice.hindi: वह जंगल से होकर गया।
practice.english: He went through the forest.
alternatives: he passed through the jungle.

practice.hindi: बारिश खिड़की से अंदर आ रही थी।
practice.english: Rain was coming in through the window.
alternatives: rain entered through the window.

practice.hindi: वे सुरंग से गुज़रे।
practice.english: They passed through the tunnel.
alternatives: they went through the tunnel.

practice.hindi: परीक्षा के दौरान मोबाइल बंद रखो।
practice.english: Keep your mobile off during the exam.
alternatives: switch off phone during the examination.
practice.hint: during + noun = उस समय के दौरान

practice.hindi: बैठक के दौरान वह चुप रहा।
practice.english: He stayed quiet during the meeting.
alternatives: he was silent during the meeting.

practice.hindi: छुट्टियों के दौरान हम गोवा गए।
practice.english: We went to Goa during the holidays.
alternatives: we visited goa during vacation.

practice.hindi: पुल नदी के ऊपर है।
practice.english: The bridge is over the river.
alternatives: the bridge is above the river.

practice.hindi: बिल्ली मेज़ के नीचे है।
practice.english: The cat is under the table.
alternatives: the cat is beneath the table.

practice.hindi: उड़ान के दौरान हम बादलों के ऊपर थे।
practice.english: During the flight, we were over the clouds.
alternatives: we flew over the clouds.

practice.hindi: दुकान सड़क के उस पार है।
practice.english: The shop is across the road.
alternatives: the store is on the other side of the road.

practice.hindi: पेड़ के पीछे एक छोटा घर है।
practice.english: There is a small house behind the tree.
alternatives: a small home is behind the tree.

practice.hindi: अस्पताल मेरे घर के बगल में है।
practice.english: The hospital is beside my house.
alternatives: the hospital is next to my home.

practice.hindi: वे नदी के किनारे-किनारे चले।
practice.english: They walked along the river.
alternatives: they strolled along the riverside.

practice.hindi: वह दीवार के साथ खड़ा था।
practice.english: He was standing against the wall.
alternatives: he leaned against the wall.

practice.hindi: मत जाओ — यह तुम्हारे हित के खिलाफ है।
practice.english: Do not go — it is against your interest.
alternatives: don't go, it's against your interest.

practice.hindi: तापमान शून्य से नीचे था।
practice.english: The temperature was below zero.
alternatives: the temperature dropped below zero.

practice.hindi: विमान बादलों के ऊपर उड़ रहा था।
practice.english: The aeroplane was flying above the clouds.
alternatives: the plane was above the clouds.
